channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: ‘The Hayley Williams Show’ Is Coming to a City Near You
item.description: 🎤 Hayley Williams is hitting the road! Who's in for a rockin' good time? 🎸 #HayleyWilliamsTour

item.title: Kendrick Lamar and Dr. Dre Return to Alma Mater for Their High School’s Groundbreaking Ceremony
item.description: 🎤 Back to where it all began! Kendrick Lamar and Dr. Dre take us on a trip down memory lane at their high school's big day! 🏫 #HomecomingVibes

item.title: Treaty Oak Revival Expand 2026 “West Texas Degenerate Tour”
item.description: 🌵 Get ready to rock with Treaty Oak Revival on their expanded tour! 🎸🎉 Which city will you be dancing in? #TourVibes

item.title: Big Fat Head Announce New Album Global Voyeur: Hear Four Tracks
item.description: 🎶 Dive into the sonic adventure with Big Fat Head's latest album, Global Voyeur! 🚀🎸 Which track are you vibing with? #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo adds new shows to tour (10 Barclays Center shows included)
item.description: Olivia’s hitting the stage in a big way! 🌟 More shows, more fun at Barclays Center! 🎶 #OliviaRodrigo #TourUpdates
